headline: Apptronik rotation-backfill cycle (cyclesOpen=6 since May 7 first-agent baseline). Canonical composite 81.4 / exemplary band sustained. Multi-partner commercial pilots (Mercedes-Benz factories, GXO Logistics warehouses, Jabil; Google co-testing) continue operationally; no documented humanoid-deployment harm or incident report this window; no anti-weaponization pledge signing event; no published Apollo model card or system card emergence. Math-hygiene cluster carryforward: published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 (+8.0 discrepancy) — largest in robotics-labs cluster; remains a data-team escalation item. Per math-hygiene protocol: no composite change proposed in evidence cycle; dimension means re-anchored to evidence and confirmed. Recommend confirm at 81.4 with math-hygiene cluster flag re-asserted. Boundary-case carry-forward: published-exemplary placement (>=81) at 0.4 above threshold; reconstructed placement would be established (73.4) — math-hygiene resolution would resolve boundary case.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.0 confirmed. A1 detection: multi-pilot deployment continues to surface operational issues; A4 amplification: institutional-governance scaffolding (Google, Mercedes-Benz, John Deere, B Capital) sustains safety-signal amplification.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4.0 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: Apollo design framing continues to acknowledge human-coexistence; partner-side industrial-safety baselines extend empathic-regard architecture.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 4.0 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: structured pilot deployment scope continues; AC4 response: institutional-governance partners provide incident-response frameworks.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.5 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: humanoid-deployment scale concentrates capability among well-resourced industrial partners; QIA sovereign-wealth backing carries forward as equity-question signal.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4.0 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: industrial-deployment context with mature partners; B5 consent: factory/warehouse deployment context aligns with declared use cases. Anti-weaponization pledge non-signatory status remains a sub-threshold INT-erosive signal.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 4.0 confirmed. AB2 transparency: funding-disclosure and pilot-deployment-disclosure functional; AB4 reparation: institutional-governance partners provide commercial-level reparation frameworks.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 4.0 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: institutional-governance scaffolding operationalizes systemic-harm reasoning; multi-partner deployment extends systemic feedback.
scoring_rationale.INT: 4.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: declared safety/industrial-deployment commitments consistent with operational pilots; I2 non-performance: limited gap between marketing posture and operational deployment.

key_evidence: Carry-over: February 10 2026 $520M Series A-X extension; total Series A = $935M at $5.3B valuation; co-led by B Capital and Google with Mercedes-Benz, PEAK6, AT&T Ventures, John Deere, Qatar Investment Authority.
Carry-over: Apollo robot active commercial pilots at Mercedes-Benz factories, GXO Logistics warehouses, Jabil; Google co-testing with Mercedes-Benz.
Carry-over: New humanoid model debut planned 2026; Austin facility expansion + new California office.
Carry-over: Apptronik anti-weaponization pledge non-signatory (sub-threshold INT-erosive).
Carry-over: No published Apollo model card or system card.
No new material score-moving evidence in current cycle (May 7-13 window).
Math-hygiene cluster carryforward: published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 (+8.0) — largest in robotics-labs cluster.

evidence.finding: $935M Series A total; $5.3B valuation; investor base profile (anchor).

evidence.source: CNBC — Apptronik raises $520M at $5B valuation for Apollo (anchor)
evidence.finding: Series A-X extension; Mercedes-Benz/GXO/Jabil pilot operational confirmation.

evidence.source: Robotics and Automation News — Apptronik nears $1B in funding (anchor)
evidence.finding: Capital deployment plan: facility expansion, new humanoid model 2026 debut, training-and-data-collection facilities.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction yields 73.4 vs published 81.4. Discrepancy +8.0 — MATH-HYGIENE FLAG carryforward. Boundary-case carryforward: published-exemplary placement at 0.4 above threshold (81); reconstructed placement would be established. Per math-hygiene protocol, no composite change proposed in evidence cycle. Dimension means re-anchored to evidence and confirmed.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Published composite 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 from dimension means. Discrepancy +8.0 points — among the largest in robotics-labs cluster.
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag for data-team review per math-hygiene cluster protocol; carryforward from May-07 first-baseline. Do NOT propose composite change in evidence cycle.
math_hygiene_flag.evidence_basis_for_dimensions: Dimension means at 4.0 (with EQU 3.5) supported by Mercedes/GXO/Jabil pilot operational evidence + institutional-governance scaffolding. If exemplary-band is canonical, dimensions would need to be ~4.25 average — not supported by available evidence.

negativeSignals: Anti-weaponization pledge non-signatory status (carryforward); QIA sovereign-wealth backing introduces conflict-of-interest dimension; aggressive 2026 deployment + new-model-debut timeline; no published Apollo model card or system card; safety framework reliant on partner-side industrial-safety baselines.
positiveSignals: $935M Series A at $5.3B valuation (carryforward); Google/Mercedes-Benz/John Deere/B Capital institutional-governance scaffolding; Apollo active commercial pilots; new humanoid model 2026 debut planned; Austin facility expansion; mature partner industrial-safety baselines.
sector_context: Robotics Labs / commercial-humanoid cluster. Rotation-backfill closure (cyclesOpen=6). Cross-reference: Agility Robotics (anti-weaponization pledge signatory, ASTM safety standards leadership), Boston Dynamics (anti-weaponization pledge co-signatory, Hyundai industrial deployment). Apptronik distinguished by highest valuation + most-diverse institutional-governance scaffolding. Math-hygiene +8.0 flag is the most significant data-quality issue in robotics-labs cluster.
open_actions_resolved: No new material score-moving evidence; dimensions re-anchored and confirmed
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene escalation: published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 — significant cluster-pattern flag
